title: echinocereus viridiflorus subsp. chloranthus
intro: Echinocereus viridiflorus subsp. chloranthus, also known as the Green-flowering Hedgehog Cactus, is a rare and endangered species of cactus native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Echinocereus viridiflorus subsp. chloranthus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures and infusions, are often used to make teas and topical creams that can be used to treat various health conditions.
